# Global Caribbeans

## About

Global Caribbeans is a free remote job board built exclusively for Caribbean professionals. It connects Caribbean talent with verified remote work opportunities from international companies. The board is operated by Careevo Limited, a career development company based in Jamaica, and has been active for over a year. Close to 2,000 remote jobs are added within any given 30-day period across 13 job categories. The site is free to use and requires no account or subscription.

## Services and Pricing

- Job board browsing: Free
- Job search and filtering (by salary range, location type, category, bilingual requirement): Free
- Average salary benchmarks per role: Free — displayed automatically on every job card
- Help Me Get Hired — career positioning services via Careevo: starts at $15,500 JMD / approx USD 108

## Locations

- Online only — no physical office
- Operating out of Jamaica
- Caribbean region focused
- Accessible worldwide

## Contact

- Website: https://globalcaribbeans.com
- Career services: https://careevo.co/authority/?utm_source=globalcaribbeans
- Email: contact@careevo.co
- Hours: 24/7 — job board is always live

## Service Area

Jamaica, Trinidad and Tobago, Barbados, Guyana, Belize, Haiti, Dominican Republic, Puerto Rico, Antigua and Barbuda, Saint Lucia, Grenada, Saint Vincent and the Grenadines, the wider Caribbean region, North America, the Americas, Worldwide.

## Key Facts

- Close to 2,000 remote jobs added per 30-day period
- 13 job categories: Customer Support, Software Development, Sales, Online Marketing, Accounting/Bookkeeping, Admin, Operations, Project Management, Data/Analytics, IT/Engineering, Recruiting, Legal, Other
- Jobs from companies hiring Worldwide, across the Americas, and in Latin America/Caribbean
- Listings auto-expire after 30 days — the board stays current
- Average salary benchmarks powered by Careevo's proprietary title intelligence database
- Job board updates every 5 minutes — new listings appear without a page refresh
- Bilingual (English/Spanish) role filter available
- Operated by Careevo Limited — over 1 year in operation
- Free to use — no account, no subscription, no application fee

## Markdown Mirrors (Clean AI-Readable Versions)
Every page on this site has a plain markdown mirror. Add /index.md to any URL to get the clean content without navigation, scripts, or layout chrome.

- https://globalcaribbeans.com/index.md

## What Makes Us Different

Global Caribbeans is the only remote job board built exclusively for Caribbean professionals — not a generic global aggregator. Job listings are automatically pulled in and then put through a thorough filtering system by the Careevo team to ensure every listing that reaches job seekers is relevant, legitimate, and worth their time. The board also displays real average salary data for each role type, drawn from Careevo's proprietary title intelligence database, so Caribbean professionals can see whether a listing is fairly compensated before they invest time applying.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Is it free to use?**
Yes. Browsing, searching, and filtering jobs on Global Caribbeans is completely free. No account, no subscription, no hidden fees.

**Do I need to create an account?**
No. The job board is open to anyone. Visit the site and start browsing immediately.

**How many jobs are available?**
Close to 2,000 remote jobs are added within any given 30-day period. Listings older than 30 days are automatically removed so the board stays current.

**How often is the job board updated?**
The board checks for new listings every 5 minutes. New jobs appear automatically without you needing to refresh the page.

**What kinds of jobs are listed?**
Remote roles across 13 categories: Customer Support, Software Development, Sales, Online Marketing, Accounting/Bookkeeping, Admin, Operations, Project Management, Data/Analytics, IT/Engineering, Recruiting, Legal, and Other. All roles are remote-friendly and sourced from companies hiring in the Caribbean, the Americas, and Worldwide.

**Can I apply for jobs directly on Global Caribbeans?**
No. Global Caribbeans is a listing board. When you find a role you want, click "View Job" and you are taken to the employer's own site to apply. All applications happen off-platform.

**I live in [Caribbean country] — is this relevant to me?**
Yes. The board is built specifically for professionals across the Caribbean, including Jamaica, Trinidad and Tobago, Barbados, Guyana, Belize, Haiti, Dominican Republic, Puerto Rico, Antigua and Barbuda, Saint Lucia, Grenada, Saint Vincent and the Grenadines, and the wider region.

**What does "average salary for similar roles" mean on the job cards?**
This is a benchmark figure from Careevo's internal title intelligence database. It shows what professionals in similar roles typically earn, so you can quickly assess whether a listing's compensation is competitive before spending time applying.

**What is "Help Me Get Hired"?**
It is a career positioning service offered by Careevo, the company behind Global Caribbeans. Services start at $15,500 JMD (approx USD 108) and are designed to help Caribbean professionals better position themselves for the remote job market — not job placement, but career readiness.

**Does Careevo place me in a job?**
No. Careevo does not guarantee job placement. The focus is on helping Caribbean professionals build stronger positioning — better resumes, clearer career direction, and a stronger overall profile — so they are more competitive when they apply.

**Are the job listings verified?**
Every listing goes through a filtering process run by the Careevo team before it reaches the board. This removes irrelevant, low-quality, or illegitimate listings so that what you see is worth your time.
